title: Navigation
description: Spiking a navigation object. In the future this would likely live as a separate artefact in a tab on a given configurable document type. But this spike allows us to hard code a blob of JSON and send to Publishing API without having to worry about the lifecycle of the associated edition.

menu_items.title: Menu items
menu_items.description: JSON hash to be sent as part of the Navigation's `details` - for spike purposes only.

linked_navigation_documents.title: Linked navigation documents
linked_navigation_documents.description: JSON hash of content IDs of documents to be linked to this navigation document as `links.linked_navigation_documents` in the Publishing API payload. Should map to the same menu items referenced in the `menu_items` field. For spike purposes only.
